Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************************

 Derived laws in Verity double bicategories

 This file collects laws that hold in Verity double bicategories. Some of these laws are
 reformulations of the standard laws of a Verity double bicategory. For example, the laws
 about the associators and unitors can be expressed in multiple ways depending on where
 the whiskering operations are put. Depending on the situation, some laws might be easier
 to use than others.

 Verity double bicategories have two laws that might seem peculiar: they express that
 vertical and horizontal composition preserve vertical and horizontal cylinder
 respectively. The reason why these laws might seem peculiar, is that they have a side
 condition. This also makes them more complicated to use, because every time that we want
 to rewrite using those laws, we need to prove two side conditions.

 However, we can equivalently express these two laws of Verity double category via 4 laws
 that do not have any side conditions. For the preservation of vertical cylinders, we use
 [lr_lwhisker_v_comp_square] and [lr_rwhisker_v_comp_square], while for the preservation of
 horizontal cylinders, we use [lr_uwhisker_h_comp_square] and [lr_dwhisker_h_comp_square].
 We also give versions of these laws using whiskering. These laws express how vertical and
 horizontal composition of squares interact with the whiskering operations of Verity double
 bicategories.

 We also give a composition for corners. This is needed to construct the composition of
 companion pairs.

 Contents
 1. Laws regarding the left unitor and composition
 2. Laws regarding the right unitor and composition
 3. Laws regarding the associator
 4. Laws regarding whiskering 2-cells
 5. Equality laws for whiskering
 6. Operations on globular squares
 7. Composing corners

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Discrete.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.DoubleBicat.VerityDoubleBicat.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope double_bicat.

(** * 1. Laws regarding the left unitor and composition *)

B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s =
linvunitor v₂ ▹s (lunitor v₁ ◃s s)


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s =
linvunitor v₂ ▹s (lunitor v₁ ◃s s)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s =
linvunitor v₂
▹s (lunitor v₂ ▹s id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s =
(lunitor v₂ • linvunitor v₂)
▹s id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s =
id₂ (id_h x · v₂) ▹s id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s = id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
lunitor v₂
▹s (linvunitor v₁ ◃s id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s) = s


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
lunitor v₂
▹s (linvunitor v₁ ◃s id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
lunitor v₂
▹s (linvunitor v₁
    ◃s (linvunitor v₂ ▹s (lunitor v₁ ◃s s))) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
linvunitor v₁
◃s (lunitor v₁ ◃s (lunitor v₂ ▹s (linvunitor v₂ ▹s s))) =
s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
(linvunitor v₁ • lunitor v₁)
◃s (lunitor v₂ ▹s (linvunitor v₂ ▹s s)) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
(linvunitor v₁ • lunitor v₁)
◃s ((linvunitor v₂ • lunitor v₂) ▹s s) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id₂ v₁ ◃s (id₂ v₂ ▹s s) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id₂ v₂ ▹s s = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s = s

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s =
linvunitor h₂ ▿s (lunitor h₁ ▵s s)


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s =
linvunitor h₂ ▿s (lunitor h₁ ▵s s)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (lunitor h₂ ▿s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s =
(lunitor h₂ • linvunitor h₂)
▿s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s =
id₂ (id_h y · h₂) ▿s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s = id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 2. Laws regarding the right unitor and composition *)

B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂ =
rinvunitor v₂ ▹s (runitor v₁ ◃s s)


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂ =
rinvunitor v₂ ▹s (runitor v₁ ◃s s)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂ =
rinvunitor v₂
▹s (runitor v₂ ▹s s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂ =
(runitor v₂ • rinvunitor v₂)
▹s s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂ =
id₂ (v₂ · id_h z) ▹s s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂ = s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
runitor v₂
▹s (rinvunitor v₁ ◃s s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂) = s


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
runitor v₂
▹s (rinvunitor v₁ ◃s s ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₂) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
runitor v₂
▹s (rinvunitor v₁
    ◃s (rinvunitor v₂ ▹s (runitor v₁ ◃s s))) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
rinvunitor v₁
◃s (runitor v₁ ◃s (runitor v₂ ▹s (rinvunitor v₂ ▹s s))) =
s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
(rinvunitor v₁ • runitor v₁)
◃s (runitor v₂ ▹s (rinvunitor v₂ ▹s s)) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
(rinvunitor v₁ • runitor v₁)
◃s ((rinvunitor v₂ • runitor v₂) ▹s s) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id₂ v₁ ◃s (id₂ v₂ ▹s s) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id₂ v₂ ▹s s = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s = s

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂ =
rinvunitor h₂ ▿s (runitor h₁ ▵s s)

w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧

s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂ =
rinvunitor h₂ ▿s (runitor h₁ ▵s s)

w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂ =
rinvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor h₂ ▿s s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂ =
(runitor h₂ • rinvunitor h₂)
▿s s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂ =
id₂ (h₂ · id_h z) ▿s s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂ = s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
runitor h₂
▿s (rinvunitor h₁ ▵s s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂) = s


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
runitor h₂
▿s (rinvunitor h₁ ▵s s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
runitor h₂
▿s (rinvunitor h₁
    ▵s (rinvunitor h₂ ▿s (runitor h₁ ▵s s))) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
rinvunitor h₁
▵s (runitor h₁ ▵s (runitor h₂ ▿s (rinvunitor h₂ ▿s s))) =
s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
(rinvunitor h₁ • runitor h₁)
▵s (runitor h₂ ▿s (rinvunitor h₂ ▿s s)) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
(rinvunitor h₁ • runitor h₁)
▵s ((rinvunitor h₂ • runitor h₂) ▿s s) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id₂ h₁ ▵s (id₂ h₂ ▿s s) = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
id₂ h₁ ▵s s = s

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
s = s

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 3. Laws regarding the associator *)

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃) =
rassociator k₁ k₂ k₃
▿s (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃)


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃) =
rassociator k₁ k₂ k₃
▿s (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃) =
rassociator k₁ k₂ k₃
▿s (lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃ ▿s s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃) =
(lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃ • rassociator k₁ k₂ k₃)
▿s s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃) =
id₂ (k₁ · (k₂ · k₃)) ▿s s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃) = s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃ =
lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃
▿s (rassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▵s s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃))


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃ =
lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃
▿s (rassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▵s s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃ =
rassociator h₁ h₂ h₃
▵s (lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃ ▿s s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃ =
rassociator h₁ h₂ h₃
▵s (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃ =
(rassociator h₁ h₂ h₃ • lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)
▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃ = id₂ (h₁ · h₂ · h₃) ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₃: square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃ = s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃ =
rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
◃s (lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ ▹s s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃))


B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃ =
rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
◃s (lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ ▹s s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃ =
rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
◃s (lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃ =
(rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ • lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃)
◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃ = id₂ (u₁ · u₂ · u₃) ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃ = s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)


B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁

s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
▹s (lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
▹s (lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ ▹s s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
(lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ • rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
▹s s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
id₂ (v₁ · (v₂ · v₃)) ▹s s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁
s₂: square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂
s₃: square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃
s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃) = s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 4. Laws regarding whiskering 2-cells *)

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ▹ v₂) ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ▹ v₂) ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = id₂ v₂ ⋆⋆ τ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₂ ⋆⋆ τ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₂ ⋆⋆ τ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = ?b
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
?b = (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂

h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧

 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ w₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ w₁ ▹s (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ (w₁ · w₂) ▹s (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.

s₁ ⋆v (τ ◃s s₂) = (v₁ ◃ τ) ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
τ ◃s s₂ = id₂ w₂ ▹s ?s₂

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂' w₂
 exact (τ ◃s s₂).

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
s₁ = s₁

      apply idpath.

 :

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ w₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ w₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v (τ ◃s s₂) = s₁ ⋆v (τ ◃s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ (w₁ · w₂) ▹s s₁ ⋆v (τ ◃s s₂) = s₁ ⋆v (τ ◃s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

v₂

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
s₁ ⋆v (τ ◃s s₂) = s₁ ⋆v (τ ◃s s₂)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ₁ ◃s s₁) ⋆v (τ₂ ◃s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

 :

v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ₁ ◃s s₁) ⋆v (τ₂ ◃s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
τ₂: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ₁ ▹ v₂') ◃s s₁ ⋆v (τ₂ ◃s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
τ₂: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ₁ ▹ v₂') ◃s ((v₁ ◃ τ₂) ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: (v₁'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) ==>
v₁
τ₂: (v₂'
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧) ==>
v₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
((τ₁ ▹ v₂') • (v₁ ◃ τ₂)) ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂ =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ◃s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ▹ w₂) ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ w₂ ⋆⋆ τ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = ?b

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

w₁'

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
?b = (τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ w₂ ⋆⋆ τ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = ?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
?b = id₂ w₂ ⋆⋆ τ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁'
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₁ ◃s ?s₁' = τ ▹s s₁
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₂ ◃s ?s₂' = id₂ w₂ ▹s s₂

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁'
 exact (τ ▹s s₁).
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
 exact s₂.

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₁ ◃s (τ ▹s s₁) = τ ▹s s₁
 
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
τ ▹s s₁ = τ ▹s s₁

      apply idpath.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₂ ◃s s₂ = id₂ w₂ ▹s s₂
 
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
s₂ = s₂

      apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ v₁ ◃s (τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ (v₁ · v₂) ◃s (τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = (τ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂) = (w₁ ◃ τ) ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂) = (w₁ ◃ τ) ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂) = τ ⋆⋆ id₂ w₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: (w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
τ ⋆⋆ id₂ w₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂)

w₂'

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
τ ⋆⋆ id₂ w₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = ?b

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂

h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

τ: (w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
τ ⋆⋆ id₂ w₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = ?b

w₂'

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
?b = τ ⋆⋆ id₂ w₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂

 exact s₁.

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ v₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ v₁ ◃s s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂) = s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

τ: (w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
id₂ (v₁ · v₂) ◃s s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂) = s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

τ: (w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂) = s₁ ⋆v (τ ▹s s₂)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

 :

 :

w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ₁ ▹s s₁) ⋆v (τ₂ ▹s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂


B: verity_double_bicat

τ₁: (w₁
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
τ₂: (w₂
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(τ₁ ▹s s₁) ⋆v (τ₂ ▹s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: (w₁
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
τ₂: (w₂
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(w₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹s (τ₁ ▹s s₁) ⋆v s₂ = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: (w₁
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
τ₂: (w₂
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
(w₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹s ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: (w₁
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) ==>
w₁'
τ₂: (w₂
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) ==>
w₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂
((τ₁ ▹ w₂) • (w₁' ◃ τ₂)) ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂ =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁' ==> h₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▹ h₂) ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁' ==> h₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▹ h₂) ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = id₂ h₂ ⋆⋆ τ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁' ==> h₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₁ ▿s (τ ▵s s₁) = τ ▵s s₁
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁' ==> h₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ▿s ?s₂ = id₂ h₂ ▵s s₂

 exact s₂.

s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ▵s s₁ = τ ▵s s₁

      apply idpath.
    
B: verity_double_bicat

k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧

s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₂ = s₂

      apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁' ==> h₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ k₁ ▿s (τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁' ==> h₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ (k₁ · k₂) ▿s (τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁' ==> h₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▵s s₁) ⋆h s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂) = (h₁ ◃ τ) ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂) = (h₁ ◃ τ) ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃

k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
?b = τ ⋆⋆ id₂ h₁ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
square_double_bicat h₂' k₂ v₂ v₃

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃

x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ▿s ?s₂ = τ ▵s s₂

    
B: verity_double_bicat

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
square_double_bicat h₂' k₂ v₂ v₃
 exact (τ ▵s s₂).
    
B: verity_double_bicat

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃

B: verity_double_bicat

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ = s₁

      apply idpath.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ▿s (τ ▵s s₂) = τ ▵s s₂
 
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ▵s s₂ = τ ▵s s₂

      apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ k₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂) = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ (k₁ · k₂) ▿s s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂) = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂) = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▵s s₂)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: h₁' ==> h₁
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ₁ ▵s s₁) ⋆h (τ₂ ▵s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: h₁' ==> h₁
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ₁ ▵s s₁) ⋆h (τ₂ ▵s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: h₁' ==> h₁
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ₁ ▹ h₂') ▵s s₁ ⋆h (τ₂ ▵s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: h₁' ==> h₁
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ₁ ▹ h₂') ▵s ((h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂) =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: h₁' ==> h₁
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
((τ₁ ▹ h₂') • (h₁ ◃ τ₂)) ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂ =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▵s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▹ k₂) ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▹ k₂) ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧

s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = id₂ k₂ ⋆⋆ τ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ⋆⋆ τ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂ = ?b

x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃

B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
square_double_bicat h₁ k₁' v₁ v₂
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃

x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ▿s s₁ = id₂ h₁ ▵s ?s₁'
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ▿s s₂ = id₂ h₂ ▵s ?s₂'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
square_double_bicat h₁ k₁' v₁ v₂
 exact (τ ▿s s₁).

square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
 exact s₂.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ▿s s₁ = id₂ h₁ ▵s (τ ▿s s₁)
 
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ▿s s₁ = τ ▿s s₁

      apply idpath.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₂ ▿s s₂ = id₂ h₂ ▵s s₂
 
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₂ = s₂

      apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ h₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ h₁ ▵s (τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ (h₁ · h₂) ▵s (τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₁ ==> k₁'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = (τ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂) = (k₁ ◃ τ) ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂) = (k₁ ◃ τ) ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂) = τ ⋆⋆ id₂ k₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ⋆⋆ id₂ k₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂ = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ⋆⋆ id₂ k₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂ = ?b
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
?b = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂)
