v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
square_double_bicat h₂ k₂' v₂ v₃
 exact (τ ▿s s₂).
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ k₁ ▿s s₁ = id₂ h₁ ▵s s₁
 
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ = s₁

      apply idpath.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ▿s s₂ = id₂ h₂ ▵s (τ ▿s s₂)
 
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
τ ▿s s₂ = τ ▿s s₂

      apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ h₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ h₁ ▵s s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂) = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
id₂ (h₁ · h₂) ▵s s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂) = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂) = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▿s s₂)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: k₁ ==> k₁'
τ₂: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ₁ ▿s s₁) ⋆h (τ₂ ▿s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂


B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: k₁ ==> k₁'
τ₂: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(τ₁ ▿s s₁) ⋆h (τ₂ ▿s s₂) = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: k₁ ==> k₁'
τ₂: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(k₁' ◃ τ₂) ▿s (τ₁ ▿s s₁) ⋆h s₂ = τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: k₁ ==> k₁'
τ₂: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
(k₁' ◃ τ₂) ▿s ((τ₁ ▹ k₂) ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂) =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁, k₁': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂, k₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ₁: k₁ ==> k₁'
τ₂: k₂ ==> k₂'
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃
((τ₁ ▹ k₂) • (k₁' ◃ τ₂)) ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂ =
τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 5. Equality laws for whiskering *)

B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': (v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧) ==>
v₁'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ◃s s = τ' ◃s s'


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': (v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧) ==>
v₁'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ◃s s = τ' ◃s s'

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': (v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧) ==>
v₁'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ' ◃s s' = τ' ◃s s'

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': (v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧) ==>
v₂'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ▹s s = τ' ▹s s'


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': (v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧) ==>
v₂'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ▹s s = τ' ▹s s'

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': (v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧) ==>
v₂'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ' ▹s s' = τ' ▹s s'

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': h₁ ==> h₁'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁' h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ▵s s = τ' ▵s s'


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': h₁ ==> h₁'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁' h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ▵s s = τ' ▵s s'

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': h₁ ==> h₁'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁' h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ' ▵s s' = τ' ▵s s'

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': h₂ ==> h₂'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ▿s s = τ' ▿s s'


B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': h₂ ==> h₂'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ ▿s s = τ' ▿s s'

  
B: verity_double_bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ, τ': h₂ ==> h₂'
s, s': square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
p: τ = τ'
q: s = s'
τ' ▿s s' = τ' ▿s s'

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 6. Operations on globular squares *)
Definition comp_ver_globular_square
           {B : verity_double_bicat}
           {x y : B}
           {v₁ v₂ v₃ : x -|-> y}
           (s₁ : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂)
           (s₂ : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₂ v₃)
  : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₃
  := linvunitor _ ▵s (lunitor _ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂).

Arguments comp_ver_globular_square {B x y v₁ v₂ v₃} s₁ s₂ /.

Definition comp_hor_globular_square
           {B : verity_double_bicat}
           {x y : B}
           {h₁ h₂ h₃ : x --> y}
           (s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_v x) (id_v y))
           (s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ (id_v x) (id_v y))
  : square_double_bicat h₁ h₃ (id_v x) (id_v y)
  := linvunitor _ ◃s (lunitor _ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂).

Arguments comp_hor_globular_square {B x y h₁ h₂ h₃} s₁ s₂ /.

(** * 7. Composing corners *)
Definition comp_diag_dr_corner
           {B : verity_double_bicat}
           {x y z : B}
           {v₁ : x -|-> y}
           {v₂ : y -|-> z}
           {h₁ : x --> y}
           {h₂ : y --> z}
           (s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_v y))
           (s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_v z))
  : square_double_bicat (h₁ · h₂) (id_h z) (v₁ · v₂) (id_v z)
  := lunitor _ ▹s
       (lunitor _ ▿s ((s₁ ⋆h id_v_square_bicat h₂)
                      ⋆v
                      (id_h_square_bicat v₂ ⋆h s₂))).

Arguments comp_diag_dr_corner {B x y z v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂} s₁ s₂ /.

Definition comp_diag_ul_corner
           {B : verity_double_bicat}
           {x y z : B}
           {v₁ : x -|-> y}
           {v₂ : y -|-> z}
           {h₁ : x --> y}
           {h₂ : y --> z}
           (s₁ : square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_v x) v₁)
           (s₂ : square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_v y) v₂)
  : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (h₁ · h₂) (id_v x) (v₁ · v₂)
  := linvunitor _ ◃s
       (linvunitor _
          ▵s ((s₁ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat _)
              ⋆v
              (id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆h s₂))).

Arguments comp_diag_ul_corner {B x y z v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂} s₁ s₂ /.


B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
linvunitor (v₁ · v₂)
◃s (runitor (v₁ · v₂)
    ▹s comp_diag_ul_corner s₃ s₄
       ⋆v comp_diag_dr_corner s₁ s₂) =
((linvunitor (v₁ · v₂)
  • (id_h x ◃ (v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)))
 • lassociator (id_h x) v₁ (id_h y · v₂))
◃s ((rassociator v₁ (id_h y) (v₂ · id_h z)
     • (v₁ ◃ (lunitor (v₂ · id_h z) • runitor v₂)))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(linvunitor (id_h x) ▹ v₁ · v₂)
◃s (((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z)) • runitor (v₁ · v₂))
    ▹s (linvunitor (id_h x)
        ▵s (lunitor (id_h z)
            ▿s s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁
               ⋆v id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆h s₄
               ⋆v (s₁ ⋆h id_v_square_bicat h₂
                   ⋆v id_h_square_bicat v₂ ⋆h s₂)))) =
?b

?b =

 • lassociator (id_h x) v₁ (id_h y · v₂))
◃s (((runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z) • (v₁ ◃ runitor v₂))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((linvunitor (id_h x) ▹ v₁ · v₂)
 • rassociator (id_h x) (id_h x) (v₁ · v₂))
◃s (((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z)) • runitor (v₁ · v₂))
    ▹s (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
        ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
            ▵s ((linvunitor (id_h z)
                 • lunitor (id_h z))
                ▿s (rinvunitor h₁ ▿s s₃)
                   ⋆v (id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆h s₄
                       ⋆v (s₁ ⋆h id_v_square_bicat h₂
                           ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))))))) =
?b

    ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
        ▵s ((linvunitor (id_h z) • lunitor (id_h z))
            ▿s (rinvunitor h₁ ▿s s₃)
               ⋆v (id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆h s₄
                   ⋆v s₁ ⋆h id_v_square_bicat h₂
                   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))))) = ?b

 • (id_h x ◃ (lunitor v₁ ▹ v₂)))
◃s (((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ (id_h z) (id_h z))
     • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
        • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
           • runitor (v₁ · v₂))))
    ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
        ▵s ((linvunitor (id_h z) • lunitor (id_h z))
            ▿s ((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
                ▹s (rinvunitor h₁ ▿s s₃)
                   ⋆v ((linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
                       ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄)
                       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))))) = 
?b

     • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
        • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
           • runitor (v₁ · v₂))))
    ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
        ▵s ((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
            ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h z)
                 • lunitor (id_h z))
                ▿s (rinvunitor h₁ ▿s s₃)
                   ⋆v ((linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
                       ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄)
                       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))))) = 
?b

⋆v (rinvunitor h₁

                      ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄)

h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((runitor h₁ • rinvunitor h₁)
 ▿s (rinvunitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁))
⋆v ((linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
    ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄) ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
?t2

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(id₂ (h₁ · id_h y)
 ▿s (rinvunitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁))
⋆v ((linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
    ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄) ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
?t2

s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(rinvunitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁)
⋆v ((linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
    ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄) ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁
   ⋆v ((linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
       ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) = ?t2

h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁
⋆v ((linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
    ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄) ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
?t2

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁
       ⋆v (linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
          ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) = ?t2

s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
s₃ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₁
⋆v (linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁)
   ⋆h (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄) ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) =

B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v (linvunitor (id_h y) ▹s s₁))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄))
⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) = ?t2

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((v₁ ◃ linvunitor (id_h y)) ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁)
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄))
⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) = ?t2

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v s₁)
⋆h ((v₁ ◃ linvunitor (id_h y))
    ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁
       ⋆v (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄))
⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) = ?t2

(s₃ ⋆v s₁)
⋆h ((v₁ ◃ linvunitor (id_h y))
    ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁
       ⋆v (runitor (id_h y) ◃s s₄)) = ?y'

    ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?t2

x, y, z: B

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(v₁ ◃ id₂ (id_h y)) ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄ =
?t2

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
id₂ (v₁ · id_h y) ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄ = ?t2

      apply lwhisker_square_id.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((((linvunitor (id_h x) ▹ v₁ · v₂)
   • rassociator (id_h x) (id_h x) (v₁ · v₂))
  • (id_h x ◃ lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂))
 • (id_h x ◃ (lunitor v₁ ▹ v₂)))
◃s (((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
     • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ (id_h z) (id_h z))
        • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
           • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
              • runitor (v₁ · v₂)))))
    ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
        ▵s ((linvunitor (id_h z) • lunitor (id_h z))
            ▿s (rinvunitor (id_h x)
                ▵s (lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
                    ◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
                        ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
                           ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁
                               ⋆v s₄)
                           ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))))))) =
?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((((linvunitor (id_h x) ▹ v₁ · v₂)
   • rassociator (id_h x) (id_h x) (v₁ · v₂))
  • (id_h x ◃ lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂))
 • (id_h x ◃ (lunitor v₁ ▹ v₂)))
◃s (((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
     • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ (id_h z) (id_h z))
        • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
           • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
              • runitor (v₁ · v₂)))))
    ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
        ▵s (rinvunitor (id_h x)
            ▵s ((linvunitor (id_h z)
                 • lunitor (id_h z))
                ▿s (lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
                    ◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
                        ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
                           ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁
                               ⋆v s₄)
                           ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))))))) =
?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((((linvunitor (id_h x) ▹ v₁ · v₂)
   • rassociator (id_h x) (id_h x) (v₁ · v₂))
  • (id_h x ◃ lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂))
 • (id_h x ◃ (lunitor v₁ ▹ v₂)))
◃s (((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
     • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ (id_h z) (id_h z))
        • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
           • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
              • runitor (v₁ · v₂)))))
    ▹s (((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
         • rinvunitor (id_h x))
        ▵s ((linvunitor (id_h z) • lunitor (id_h z))
            ▿s (lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
                ◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
                    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
                       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
                       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))))) = 
?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((((linvunitor (id_h x) ▹ v₁ · v₂)
   • rassociator (id_h x) (id_h x) (v₁ · v₂))
  • (id_h x ◃ lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂))
 • (id_h x ◃ (lunitor v₁ ▹ v₂)))
◃s (((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
     • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ (id_h z) (id_h z))
        • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
           • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
              • runitor (v₁ · v₂)))))
    ▹s (((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
         • rinvunitor (id_h x))
        ▵s (id₂ (id_h z)
            ▿s (lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
                ◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
                    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
                       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
                       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))))) = 
?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((((linvunitor (id_h x) ▹ v₁ · v₂)
   • rassociator (id_h x) (id_h x) (v₁ · v₂))
  • (id_h x ◃ lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂))
 • (id_h x ◃ (lunitor v₁ ▹ v₂)))
◃s (((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
     • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ (id_h z) (id_h z))
        • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
           • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
              • runitor (v₁ · v₂)))))
    ▹s (((linvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
         • rinvunitor (id_h x))
        ▵s (lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
            ◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
                ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
                   ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
                   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))))) = ?b

 • (rassociator (id_h x) (id_h x) (v₁ · v₂)
    • ((id_h x ◃ lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂)
       • (id_h x ◃ (lunitor v₁ ▹ v₂)))))

           • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
              • runitor (v₁ · v₂)))))
    ▹s ((linvunitor (id_h x)
         • (runitor (id_h x) • rinvunitor (id_h x)))
        ▵s (lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
            ◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
                ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
                   ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
                   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))))) = ?b

h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
◃s (((v₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ ▹ id_h z))
     • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ (id_h z) (id_h z))
        • (lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z · id_h z)
           • ((v₁ · v₂ ◃ lunitor (id_h z))
              • runitor (v₁ · v₂)))))
    ▹s (linvunitor (id_h x)
        ▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
            ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
               ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))) = ?b

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧

               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
               ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))) = ?b0

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁

?b0 = ?b

x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((v₁ ◃ ((rinvunitor v₂ • runitor v₂) ▹ id_h z))
 • lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)) • runitor (v₁ · v₂) =
?y'

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((v₁ ◃ (id₂ v₂ ▹ id_h z)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z))
• runitor (v₁ · v₂) = ?y'

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
((v₁ ◃ id₂ (v₂ · id_h z)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z))
• runitor (v₁ · v₂) = ?y'

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(id₂ (v₁ · (v₂ · id_h z)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z))
• runitor (v₁ · v₂) = ?y'

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z) • runitor (v₁ · v₂) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
◃s ((lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z) • runitor (v₁ · v₂))
    ▹s (linvunitor (id_h x)
        ▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
            ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
               ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))) = ?b

    apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
◃s ((lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z) • runitor (v₁ · v₂))
    ▹s (linvunitor (id_h x)
        ▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
            ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
               ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))) =
((id_h x ◃ (v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂))
 • lassociator (id_h x) v₁ (id_h y · v₂))
◃s (((runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z) • (v₁ ◃ runitor v₂))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
◃s ((lassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z) • runitor (v₁ · v₂))
    ▹s (linvunitor (id_h x)
        ▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
            ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
               ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)))) =
(lassociator (id_h x) v₁ v₂
 • (id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂))
◃s (((runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z) • (v₁ ◃ runitor v₂))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧

s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v s₁) ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) = ?t2

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v s₁) ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v s₁) ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?b
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
?b = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v s₁) ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?b

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
s₃ ⋆v s₁ = ?y'0

      
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
?y'0 = s₃ ⋆v s₁

      apply runitor_v_comp_square''.
    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
 ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
     ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y)))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
 ◃s (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
     ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y)))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
◃s (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
   ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
 ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?t2

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
    ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?t2

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
(s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
    ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p:= double_bicat_interchange B (s₃ ⋆v s₁)
  (id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
  (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y)) s₄: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
(s₃ ⋆v s₁) ⋆h id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y)
⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y) ⋆h s₄
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
(rinvunitor (id_h y)
 ▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁))
⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y) ⋆h s₄
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
(rinvunitor (id_h y)
 ▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁))
⋆v (linvunitor h₂ ▿s (lunitor (id_h y) ▵s s₄))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (rinvunitor (id_h y)
    ▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁))
   ⋆v (lunitor (id_h y) ▵s s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B

v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)

p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =

   ⋆v (lunitor (id_h y) ▵s s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))

           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)

       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =

    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x)
    ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁
       ⋆v (rinvunitor (id_h y)
           ▵s (lunitor (id_h y) ▵s s₄)))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x)
    ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁
       ⋆v (rinvunitor (id_h y)
           ▵s (runitor (id_h y) ▵s s₄)))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x)
    ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁
       ⋆v ((rinvunitor (id_h y) • runitor (id_h y))
           ▵s s₄))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x)
    ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (id₂ (id_h y) ▵s s₄))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v (s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
▹s ((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
    ◃s (lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂
        ◃s (rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
            ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
(id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
◃s (lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂
    ◃s ((runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
        ▹s (rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
            ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)
    ▹s (rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
        ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p':= maponpaths
  (λ z0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x · id_h x)
            (id_h y · h₂) (id_h x · v₁ · id_h y)
            (v₁ · id_h y · v₂),
   rinvunitor (id_h x) ▵s (lunitor h₂ ▿s z0)) p: (λ z0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x · id_h x)
          (id_h y · h₂) (id_h x · v₁ · id_h y)
          (v₁ · id_h y · v₂),
 rinvunitor (id_h x) ▵s (lunitor h₂ ▿s z0))
  ((s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
   ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
(λ z0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x · id_h x)
          (id_h y · h₂) (id_h x · v₁ · id_h y)
          (v₁ · id_h y · v₂),
 rinvunitor (id_h x) ▵s (lunitor h₂ ▿s z0))
  (linvunitor h₂
   ▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p':= maponpaths
  (λ z0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x · id_h x)
            (id_h y · h₂) (id_h x · v₁ · id_h y)
            (v₁ · id_h y · v₂),
   rinvunitor (id_h x) ▵s (lunitor h₂ ▿s z0)) p: rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (linvunitor h₂
        ▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s ((linvunitor h₂ • lunitor h₂)
    ▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (id₂ h₂
    ▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄))
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
(rinvunitor (id_h x) • runitor (id_h x))
▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
id₂ (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂)

 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)

B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂) = ?b
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
?b =
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))

x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =

p': rinvunitor (id_h x)

    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =

 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)

     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂) = ?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ ⋆v s₂ = ?t2

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄ = ?y'

    exact (!p').
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x)
        ▵s (lunitor h₂
            ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y)
                   ⋆v s₄))) ⋆v s₂) =
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x)
        ▵s (lunitor h₂
            ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y)
                   ⋆v s₄)) ⋆v s₂)) =
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s (rinvunitor (id_h x)
    ▵s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
         • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
        ▹s (lunitor h₂
            ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y)
                   ⋆v s₄)) ⋆v s₂)) =
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
     • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
    ◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
         • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
        ▹s (lunitor h₂
            ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
               ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y)
                   ⋆v s₄)) ⋆v s₂)) =
linvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
        ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))

v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧

s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
     • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
    ◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
         • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
        ▹s (lunitor h₂
            ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))

                   ⋆v s₄)) ⋆v s₂)) =

           ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (lunitor h₂
        ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄))
       ⋆v s₂) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁
           ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y) ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁
           ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y) ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁
           ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y) ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) = ?b
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
?b =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁
           ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y) ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) = ?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
(s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y)
    ⋆v s₄) ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) = ?t2

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
(s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y)
    ⋆v s₄) = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y)
⋆v s₄ = ?t2

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y) =
?y'

    apply runitor_v_comp_square'.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h ((rinvunitor v₁
            ▹s (runitor v₁ ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁))
           ⋆v s₄) ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)

s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =

    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =

((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
