v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
     • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
    ▹s (((rinvunitor v₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ id_h z)
        ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
           ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
               ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
           ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂))) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)

s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
?b =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s ((((rinvunitor v₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ id_h z)
     • (rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
        • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)))
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) = ?b

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
(((rinvunitor v₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ id_h z)
 • (rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
    • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)))
▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
   ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
       ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) = ?t2

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =

       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((rinvunitor v₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ id_h z)
• (rassociator (v₁ · id_h y) v₂ (id_h z)
   • (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z)) = ?y'

v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧

 • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z))
• (runitor v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z) = ?y'

x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)

s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂

⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =

B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (id₂ v₁ ▹ v₂ · id_h z) =
?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z) • id₂ (v₁ · (v₂ · id_h z)) =
?y'

    apply id2_right.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s (rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
    ▹s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
     • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
       ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ v₂ (id_h z)
▹s (rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
    ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
           ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
   ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
       ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) =
(rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
 ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
    ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
        ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

((id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
   ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
       ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) = ?b
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
?b =
(rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
 ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
    ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
        ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

 • lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂)
◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
   ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)

x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧

(id_h x · v₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂ = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =

▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
linvunitor v₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ (id_h x · v₁)
• lassociator (id_h x · v₁) (id_h y) v₂ = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
id₂ v₂ ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁) = ?y'

    
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁) ▹ v₂ = ?y'

    apply idpath.
  
B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
(rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁) ▹ v₂)
◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
   ⋆h ((runitor v₁ ▹ id_h y)
       ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
   ⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂) =
(rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
 ◃s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
    ⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
        ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄))
⋆v (lunitor h₂ ▵s s₂)

s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)

B: verity_double_bicat
x, y, z: B
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ (id_h y) v₁ (id_h y)
s₂: square_double_bicat h₂ (id_h z) v₂ (id_h z)
s₃: square_double_bicat (id_h x) h₁ (id_h x) v₁
s₄: square_double_bicat (id_h y) h₂ (id_h y) v₂
p: (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄) =
linvunitor h₂
▿s (runitor (id_h x) ▵s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄)
p': rinvunitor (id_h x)
▵s (lunitor h₂
    ▿s (s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_h_square_bicat (id_h y))
       ⋆h (id_h_square_bicat (v₁ · id_h y) ⋆v s₄)) =
s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v s₄
(rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
 ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h ((rassociator v₁ (id_h y) (id_h y)
     • (v₁ ◃ lunitor (id_h y)))
    ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄) =
(rinvunitor (id_h x · v₁)
 ◃s s₃ ⋆v s₁ ⋆v id_v_square_bicat (id_h y))
⋆h (runitor (v₁ · id_h y)
    ◃s id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆v s₄)
